parameters.name: eda.ne.name
parameters.description: Network element name reported by GET /health and used as the Nova server name
parameters.comments: Also drives the Heat template ne_name parameter (OS::Nova::Server name).

parameters.name: eda.ne.type
parameters.description: Network element type string reported by GET /health
parameters.comments: Cosmetic; does not change behavior of the activation engine.

parameters.name: eda.vendor.name
parameters.description: Vendor/brand name reported alongside the product in GET /version and in generated documentation
parameters.comments: Cosmetic branding only; does not affect API/CLI behavior.

parameters.name: eda.registry.url
parameters.description: Container registry hostname the eda-vne Docker image is pulled from
parameters.comments: Only relevant when eda.docker.image does not already include a fully-qualified registry host.

parameters.name: eda.docker.image
parameters.description: Docker image reference deployed by the Heat template (eda_docker_image parameter)
parameters.comments: Pushed by the operator before running 'openstack stack create'; see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

parameters.name: eda.api.host
parameters.description: Bind address of the EDA REST API server
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_API_HOST.

parameters.name: eda.api.port
parameters.description: TCP port the EDA REST API listens on
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_API_PORT; also the Heat template api_port parameter (opened in the security group).

parameters.name: eda.api.url
parameters.description: Base URL eda-cli uses to reach the REST API when --api-url is not given
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_API_URL, read by the CLI only (has no effect on the server).

parameters.name: eda.network.id
parameters.description: Neutron network the VNE's port is attached to
parameters.comments: Heat template network_id parameter; must be a network UUID reachable from the operator's OpenStack project.

parameters.name: eda.network.externalId
parameters.description: External/public Neutron network used to allocate a floating IP
parameters.comments: Heat template external_network_id parameter.

parameters.name: eda.network.assignFloatingIp
parameters.description: Whether to allocate and associate a floating IP so the API is reachable from outside the project network
parameters.comments: Heat template assign_floating_ip parameter.

parameters.name: eda.network.managementCidr
parameters.description: CIDR allowed to reach the API (tcp/eda.api.port) and SSH (tcp/22) in the security group
parameters.comments: Restrict this before exposing the VNE outside an isolated lab; default is permissive for first-time deployment.

parameters.name: eda.openstack.image
parameters.description: Glance image used to boot the VNE instance
parameters.comments: Must be a cloud-init-capable image; Heat template image parameter.

parameters.name: eda.openstack.flavor
parameters.description: Nova flavor for the VNE instance
parameters.comments: Heat template flavor parameter; increase for larger activation throughput.

parameters.name: eda.openstack.keyName
parameters.description: Name of an existing Nova keypair used for management SSH access
parameters.comments: Heat template key_name parameter; must already exist in the target OpenStack project.

parameters.name: eda.storage.dbPath
parameters.description: Filesystem path of the SQLite database holding templates, activations, network elements and alarms
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_DB_PATH; mount as a Cinder volume so state survives instance recreation.

parameters.name: eda.storage.backend
parameters.description: Persistence backend used by the store layer
parameters.comments: Informational only in this release; eda/core/store.py isolates all SQL so a Postgres backend can be substituted without changing the engine or API.

parameters.name: eda.engine.stepMinDelaySeconds
parameters.description: Lower bound of the randomized per-step delay used by the simulated activation workflow
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_STEP_MIN_DELAY; lower for faster demos, raise to make timing closer to real NETCONF/SSH round trips.

parameters.name: eda.engine.stepMaxDelaySeconds
parameters.description: Upper bound of the randomized per-step delay used by the simulated activation workflow
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_STEP_MAX_DELAY; must be >= eda.engine.stepMinDelaySeconds.

parameters.name: eda.security.apiKey
parameters.description: Shared secret enforced on /templates, /network-elements, /activations and /alarms (AAA equivalent)
parameters.comments: Environment variable EDA_API_KEY / Heat parameter eda_api_key. Empty disables authentication (convenient for a lab, not recommended once the API is reachable outside a trusted network). Clients send it back as the X-API-Key header; /health and /metrics stay open regardless.

parameters.name: eda.activation.autoRetry.maxAttempts
parameters.description: Default number of automatic workflow attempts before an activation is marked FAILED and an alarm is raised
parameters.comments: Per-request override: pass params.auto_retry.max_attempts on POST /activations (Activation Replicator equivalent). Not a server-wide setting in this release, listed here for completeness.

parameters.name: eda.activation.autoRetry.backoffSeconds
parameters.description: Delay between automatic retry attempts
parameters.comments: Per-request override: params.auto_retry.backoff_seconds on POST /activations.
